What We Offer
OUR SERVICES
🎬 01

Wedding Videography

Full-day cinematic coverage of your wedding from preparation to reception. Delivered as a 10-15 min highlight film.

Starting at $1,500
📷 02

Wedding Photography

Professional photography capturing every emotion, detail, and candid moment. Delivered as a curated gallery of high-resolution images.

Starting at $1,200
💍 03

Photo + Video Bundle

Get the complete package — both photo and video coverage at a discounted rate. The ultimate way to preserve your day.

Starting at $2,400
🎉 04

Event Coverage

Corporate events, birthday celebrations, graduations, and more. We bring the same cinematic energy to every occasion.

Starting at $800
💏 05

Engagement Sessions

Relaxed, romantic photo sessions for couples. Perfect for save-the-dates, social media, or just a beautiful memory.

Starting at $400
✈️ 06

Destination Weddings

We travel wherever your love takes you. Destination wedding coverage available nationwide and internationally.

Custom Quote

Years Filming
Our Story
BEHIND THE LENS

At Smoove Films, we believe every wedding is a one-of-a-kind story waiting to be told. We're more than just videographers and photographers — we're storytellers who pour passion into every frame.

From intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations, we bring a cinematic eye and a calm, professional presence to your most important day. Our goal is simple: make you feel the day all over again, every time you watch your film.

Cinematic 4K video production
Professional photo editing & color grading
Fast turnaround — galleries within 4 weeks
Second shooter options for full coverage
